knowledge.insight: Hackney: 'I like big poles, big line and big hook sets. It's easier to get a bite on a wacky worm than a 3/4-ounce Hack Attack Jig, but at the end of the day the results are the same. It boils down to how you like to fish.'
Hackney: 'The first six events during the prespawn/spawn period allow power fishing because bass are most active and in the rut.'
